reference_block.name: scope
reference_block.title: Scope
reference_block.statement: Use this bundle for Model Context Protocol design, MCP server and client feature review, tool contracts, resource exposure, prompt workflows, consent checkpoints and agent-tooling safety.
Do not use this bundle as a substitute for provider-specific connector APIs, GitHub repository rules, OpenAI model behaviour, Cloudflare runtime behaviour, Airtable API rules or Mural API rules.

reference_block.name: source-rule
reference_block.title: Source rule
reference_block.statement: Only treat official Model Context Protocol documentation as authoritative for MCP protocol claims in this bundle.
If a requested MCP behaviour is not supported by the loaded MCP docs, state the evidence gap and avoid implementation claims.
